title: [FIRRTL] Module hierarchy should be exported to `ModuleHierarchyAnnotation` filename
body:
The following two annotations are not currently respected:
```
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.ModuleHierarchyAnnotation",
    "filename":"metadata/module_hier.json"
  },

  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.TestHarnessHierarchyAnnotation",
    "filename":"metadata/testharness_hier.json"
  },
```

These are the files which we should be exporting the module hierachy information to.

1. We should only be emitting the hiearchy information if the annotations exist
2. We should use this filename instead of the hardcoded path in [LowerToHW](https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/main/lib/Conversion/FIRRTLToHW/LowerToHW.cpp#L460)
```c++
  auto *newMainModule = state.oldToNewModuleMap[circuit.getMainModule()];
  newMainModule->setAttr(moduleHierarchyFileAttrName,
                         hw::OutputFileAttr::getFromDirectoryAndFilename(
                             circuit.getContext(),
                             getMetadataDir(circuit).getValue(),
                             "testharness_hier.json",
                             /*excludeFromFilelist=*/true));
```
3. Make sure we remove the annotation
4. Document this annotation in FIRRTLAnnotations.md
